response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong web/backend credentials, but the resume shows no native Japanese proficiency (a hard requirement), no embedded networking or LAN-switch background, no Linux kernel modification work, and no security-protocol experience (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal). C/C++ exposure is limited to a 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015; primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. The role's core technical and language requirements are not met.
strengths: 10+ years of professional software development experience
Some prior C/C++ experience on a developer-tools product at National Instruments
Comfortable on Linux and across multiple languages and stacks
concerns: No native Japanese language proficiency (hard requirement)
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or network security (MACsec/802.1X) experience
No evidence of Linux kernel source-level investigation or modification

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking / switch security background
Limited recent C / UNIX systems programming
